data.location: 907 Arendell St, Suite A, Morehead City, NC 28557
data.event_date: Within coming weeks (as early as next week)
data.status: preparing to open in the coming weeks
data.short_description: Gino's Panino is an Italian-themed sandwich shop preparing to open in Morehead City, offering housemade sandwiches, subs, wraps, paninis, and salads with counter-service ordering. The space will operate primarily as a takeout concept with both indoor and outdoor seating, and plans to include a small retail section with Italian grocery items.

data.location: 111 S. White Street, Suite B, Wake Forest, NC 27587
data.event_date: In about two weeks (year not specified)
data.status: targeting an opening in about two weeks
data.short_description: Las Mas Mexican Food & Cantina is opening in a remodeled and renovated space previously occupied for 24 years by Las Margaritas, following a two-year rebrand and renovation process. The full-service Mexican restaurant and cantina will seat 98 guests and serve expanded traditional Mexican dishes alongside familiar menu staples.

data.location: 5615 Normandy Blvd, Jacksonville, FL 32205
data.short_description: Black Berry's Creamery & Cafe is targeting a June 15 opening at a former Rally's site in Jacksonville, serving as the anchor dessert destination within a larger food truck park developed by co-owners Raymond Paulk and Lynn Little. The concept will offer a wide range of ice cream flavors, milkshakes, shaved ice, and fresh-squeezed lemonades, with plans to introduce house-made ice cream within the first six months.

data.location: 16905 Gulf Boulevard, North Redington Beach, FL 33708
data.short_description: Music City Beach Bar is a Nashville-style honky tonk venue targeting an April 20 opening at 16905 Gulf Boulevard, bringing live country music, a full-service bar, and casual bar food to the Gulf Coast. The 2,100 sq ft space seats roughly 130 guests and features two eight-foot glass garage doors opening toward the beach.

data.location: 4969 Roswell Rd, Atlanta, GA 30342
data.short_description: Teriyaki Madness is targeting a mid-June opening at 4969 Roswell Rd in Atlanta, with construction expected to begin April 27 pending final permitting and a five-to-six week buildout. The fast-casual Japanese-inspired restaurant will seat approximately 25–30 guests indoors with additional outdoor seating, and is franchisee Gonzalo de Aristegui's second Teriyaki Madness location.

data.location: 1430 Lake Hearn Dr NE, Suite A, Brookhaven, GA 30319
data.status: targeting an early to mid-May debut
data.short_description: Mama's Pizza is opening a second location at 1430 Lake Hearn Dr NE in Brookhaven within an Amli apartment development, featuring approximately 48 indoor seats, 32 patio seats, a walk-up garage-style window, and 12 draft beer taps. The menu will largely mirror the Alpharetta location with classic pizzas and Italian offerings, alongside rotating monthly specials.

data.location: 250 Cleveland Street, Locust Grove, GA 30248
data.event_date: Around Father's Day weekend (year not specified)
data.status: plans to open around Father's Day weekend
data.short_description: The Gin Mill is a catering and events venue from Quinn's Catering owner Quinn O'Neill, nearing completion in Locust Grove with interior construction complete and final approvals underway. The space includes a banquet hall for up to 150 guests, a large covered patio, and an outdoor garden designed for weddings, private events, and community gatherings.

data.location: 644 N Highland Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30306
data.short_description: Some Luck is a bar-forward late-night dining concept from the team behind Talat Market, targeting a July 1 opening at 644 N Highland Ave NE in Atlanta's Virginia-Highland area. The menu will center on Thai barfare including papaya salad, skewers, congee-style dishes, and snackable items, with a beverage program of Thai-inspired cocktails and late-night hours until 2 a.m. on Fridays and Saturdays.

data.location: 312 East Broad Street, Dunn, NC 28334
data.event_date: Grand opening in approximately 30 days (year not specified)
data.status: soft opened last weekend, grand opening planned in approximately 30 days
data.short_description: Tavern 312 soft opened last weekend at 312 East Broad Street in Dunn, NC, with a grand opening planned approximately 30 days later. The laid-back bar concept features two pool tables, arcade-style games, a golf machine, and relies on food trucks for food service while the bar provides drinks.

data.store_name: Float Dirty Soda and Ice Cream
data.location: 1013 Battleground Ave, Greensboro, NC 27408
data.short_description: Float Dirty Soda and Ice Cream is working toward an August opening in Greensboro, combining a dirty soda bar with a retro-inspired soda fountain and ice cream shop in a 1,000 sq ft former car wash space. The concept will feature a build-your-own dirty soda bar using Coca-Cola products and flavored syrups, alongside ice cream sourced from Homeland Creamery, a family-owned dairy in Julian, NC.

data.location: 5076 Styers Ferry Rd, Lewisville, NC 27023
data.short_description: Shakeburger is targeting a mid-June opening in Lewisville, NC, in a new-build modern family-friendly restaurant with approximately 50 indoor seats and 60 covered patio seats. The counter-service concept will offer 100% Angus ground chuck burgers, hot dogs, chicken sandwiches, barbecue, fish sandwiches, milkshakes, flurries, and dipped ice cream cones at affordable pricing.

data.location: 3201 Corrine Drive, Orlando, FL 32803
data.event_date: Late April to early May (year not specified)
data.status: targeting a late April to early May opening
data.short_description: Creo is a fast-casual Italian-inspired walk-up concept opening inside East End Market at 3201 Corrine Drive in Orlando, with a buildout nearing completion and inspections pending. The menu focuses on Italian small plates drawing from Venetian and Tuscan traditions, including cicchetti, house-made breads, rotating entrees, and house-made sodas and mocktails.

data.location: 928 Promenade St, Panama City, FL 32404
data.short_description: Jeremiah's Italian Ice is targeting a mid-May opening at 928 Promenade St in Panama City, marking the first Jeremiah's franchise for owner Bob Amin and the concept's first location in the area. The fast-casual concept offers Italian ice layered with ice cream, gelati combinations, ice cream sandwiches, cakes, and take-home quart options.

data.store_name: The Wagyu House by Meat N' Bone
data.location: 601 N Federal Hwy, #113, Hallandale Beach, FL 33009
data.status: now in soft opening and moving toward a full opening phase
data.short_description: The Wagyu House by Meat N' Bone is currently in soft opening at 601 N Federal Hwy, #113 in Hallandale Beach, offering a full-service steakhouse experience centered on more than 32 cuts of beef from USDA Choice to Japanese Wagyu. The 3,000 sq ft, 120-seat space also includes a retail boutique with over 400 curated protein products available for purchase.

data.location: 106 NW Main St, Williston, FL 32696
data.short_description: The Ivy House is preparing to reopen at 106 NW Main St in Williston after a fire forced the business to close more than two years ago, with owner Waica Micheletti targeting a late July opening. The restored 1912 French country-style home will feature approximately 150 indoor seats, 40–50 outdoor seats, a new bar called ROOTS, and a menu anchored by original family recipes.

data.location: 2431 Town Center Ave, Building 2, Melbourne, FL 32940
data.short_description: Lakeside Social is targeting an early June 2026 opening in Viera, offering a large-scale food truck park with six semi-permanent food trucks, two full-service bars, a performance stage, and a waterfront green space. The venue will seat approximately 250–300 guests with capacity for up to 1,000 standing, with all events planned to be free for the community.

data.location: 7573 Raymary St, Units A-B, Bokeelia, FL 33922
data.status: targeting a mid-May launch for hot food service
data.short_description: Coconut Island Market, currently open as a convenience-style market, is preparing to add quick-service hot food including tacos, hamburgers, burritos, fruit cups, and aguas frescas by mid-May. The addition comes in response to demand from local workers seeking fast lunch options, with an option to order ahead for pickup.

data.location: 7573 Raymary St (neighboring unit), Bokeelia, FL 33922
data.short_description: Elegancia Beauty Spa, owned by Niurica Ortiz, is preparing to open in a unit neighboring Coconut Island Market in the same plaza in Bokeelia, targeting a June debut. No further details about the spa's offerings were provided in the article.

data.location: 12098 Collegiate Way, Orlando, FL 32817
data.short_description: Meltwich, a Canada-based quick-service restaurant built around grilled cheese sandwiches, burgers, poutines, and comfort food, is targeting a mid-to-late May opening at 12098 Collegiate Way in Orlando, the first Meltwich in Orlando and the second in Florida. The approximately 2,000 sq ft space will seat roughly 20–50 guests, with catering planned as a major focus for the UCF-area location.

data.location: 10150 Ball Ground Hwy, Ball Ground, GA 30107
data.short_description: Northbound Tavern is targeting a June opening at 10150 Ball Ground Hwy in Ball Ground, GA, offering full-service American tavern fare with a bar and seating for around 80 guests. The menu will include sandwiches, steak cuts, and seafood, with wood-fired cooking techniques incorporated for items like wings and steaks.

data.location: 420 Old Canton Rd, Ball Ground, GA 30107
data.short_description: La Cantina Off Main is targeting a June opening at 420 Old Canton Rd in Ball Ground as a second location for the team's Canton-based La Cantina on Main, seating approximately 75–80 guests inside plus 20–30 on a patio. The full-service restaurant will serve authentic northeastern Mexican cuisine including aguachile de ribeye, cachetadas and campechana tacos, and wood-fired dishes.

data.location: 510 Dodecanese Blvd, Tarpon Springs, FL 34689
data.status: targeting a soft opening sometime next week
data.short_description: Leonidas, a Belgian chocolate brand, is preparing to open along the Sponge Docks in Tarpon Springs, offering imported Belgian chocolates, Greek desserts, and a full coffee bar with indoor seating for 35–40 guests and 30 outdoors. The shop will carry chocolates flown in weekly from Belgium and pastries imported from Greece, alongside in-house items and coffee from local roaster Aleph Premium Coffee.

data.location: 1530 Ellsworth Industrial Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
data.short_description: Pie Bar is planning a new location inside Westside Market at 1530 Ellsworth Industrial Blvd NW in Atlanta, offering espresso drinks, sweet and savory pies, and grab-and-go service near the front entrance. The location will also function as a central pickup point for online orders, with menu items including chicken pot pie, quiche, shepherd's pie, and eight to ten rotating sweet pie flavors.

data.location: 1048 Copperfield Blvd NE, Suite 101, Concord, NC 28025
data.event_date: Soft opening mid-May; grand opening late May or early June (year not specified)
data.short_description: Iron Oak Cigar Lounge is under construction in Concord, NC, with owner Bjorn Mohaugen developing a cigar-focused concept that will also include a bar and indoor golf simulator. The team is targeting a soft opening in mid-May, followed by a grand opening in late May or early June.

data.location: 3661 Concord Parkway South, Concord, NC 28027
data.status: opening in the former location of Smoothie King
data.short_description: The Tickled Pickle Deli is opening in the former Smoothie King location at 3661 Concord Parkway South, owned by couple Sarah and Barrett Dabbs, who also own Johnny Roger's BBQ & Burgers in the same shopping plaza. No opening date was specified in the article.

data.location: 10610 Centrum Pkwy, Suite L, Pineville, NC 28134
data.event_date: Within about one to one-and-a-half months (year not specified)
data.status: has a goal to open within about one to one-and-a-half months
data.short_description: Taste of Bengal is preparing to open in Pineville, NC, offering a Bengali-focused concept blending takeout food, catering, frozen goods, and a halal butcher counter. Owner Sabyasachi Patra told Business Debut the timeline is pending remaining buildout progress.

data.location: 4502 Fountain Drive, Wilmington, NC 28403
data.event_date: Late spring to early summer (year not specified)
data.status: targeting a late spring to early summer opening
data.short_description: Shaka Taco is preparing to open a new location at 4502 Fountain Drive in Wilmington, near the University of North Carolina Wilmington, bringing its coastal taco concept to a standalone space. Construction is ongoing with a late spring to early summer opening targeted.

data.location: 1510 Abbotts Creek Cir, Kernersville, NC 27284
data.short_description: Breakfast Time is targeting a late 2026 opening in Kernersville, NC, as a 200-seat dine-in concept offering an all-day breakfast and brunch menu. Signature items include banana foster waffles, pancakes, French toast, liver mush, fried pork tenderloin, and ribeyes, alongside specialty pancakes and house-made syrups.

data.location: 2180 W First St, Fort Myers, FL 33901
data.short_description: Point Ybel Brewing Co. is a planned downtown brewery expansion in Fort Myers with 17 taps, indoor seating, and events including live music and trivia. Food will come from food trucks and nearby restaurants, with planned daily hours of 11 a.m.–11 p.m.

data.location: 535 SE Baldwin Dr., Lee, FL 32059
data.short_description: Mando's Cuisine is a roaming food truck serving Lee County with a scratch-made menu focused on baked empanadas, quesadillas, and rotating specials, operated by Jose and Sandra Flores. Hours are Wednesday through Saturday, 10 a.m.–5 p.m.

data.location: 8156 Alico Road, Unit 10, Fort Myers, FL 33912
data.short_description: The Roast & Rush Society is a hybrid coffee and botanical tea lounge opening soon in Fort Myers, featuring espresso drinks, kava and kratom teas, and light food options. The concept is designed for daytime workspace energy and late-night social vibes, with weekends extending until 2 a.m.

data.location: 5110 Pine Island Rd, #140, Bokeelia, FL 33922
data.short_description: Savage Skillet is a brunch-forward restaurant now open in Bokeelia, FL, with a modern interior and seating for around 50 guests. The menu features elevated brunch dishes, rotating specials, cinnamon rolls, and specialty coffee drinks, operated by Erika Fernandez and Carla Arguello.

data.location: 4720 SE 9th Place, Ste 200, Cape Coral, FL 33904
data.short_description: Big Nick's BBQ is listed as a coming soon restaurant in Cape Coral, FL at 4720 SE 9th Place, Ste 200. No further details about the concept, opening date, or status were provided in the article text.

data.location: 32 E Las Olas Blvd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33301
data.short_description: Sweetwaters is a new full-service coastal seafood restaurant targeting an October opening at 32 E Las Olas Blvd in Fort Lauderdale, developed as a ground-up build by Specialty Restaurants Corporation. The nearly 300-seat open, airy space will feature a full raw bar, hot seafood tower, fresh fish selections, lobster and shrimp risotto, and a full cocktail program connected to the waterfront.

data.location: 12325 Northlake Blvd., Suite 130, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33412
data.short_description: Smoke and Maple Restaurant is targeting a late June opening in Palm Beach Gardens as a full-service gastropub with approximately 167 seats including a 22-seat bar. The "rustic refined" menu from executive chef David Schroeder will feature a smash burger, rotating oysters, a raw bar, and signature dishes like "Kentucky barbecue fried gator," with a focus on quality ingredients and no seed oils.

data.location: 4521 Southside Boulevard, Jacksonville, FL 32216
data.status: targeting an October or November opening
data.short_description: Supra Revolving Sushi Bar is targeting an October or November opening in Jacksonville, offering a conveyor belt-style dining experience alongside a full-service staff in a space designed to seat 150–180 guests. The menu will feature sushi, hibachi, ramen, appetizers, milk tea, and alcoholic beverages in an interactive format.

data.location: 114 Sailors Cove Dr, Port St. Joe, FL 32456
data.short_description: The Fish Market is targeting a May 10 opening in Port St. Joe, combining a full-service seafood restaurant, seafood market, and retail component operated by the Arreguin family. The concept will seat 150–170 guests inside and outside and feature a seafood boil with snow crab, local shrimp, mussels, and clams, along with a full bar with tropical cocktails and craft beer.

data.location: 550 Wells Rd, Suite 1, Orange Park, FL 32073
data.event_date: Late April to early May (year not specified)
data.status: targeting a late April to early May opening
data.short_description: Paradise Restaurant & Lounge is targeting a late April to early May opening in Orange Park, offering a full-service experience with approximately 140 seats and a full liquor bar. The menu will focus on pasta dishes, char-grilled oysters, flatbreads, pork chop entrées, bar staples, and weekend brunch.

data.location: 12553 Bartram Park Blvd., Suite 302, Jacksonville, FL 32258
data.status: targeting a June 18 opening, pending permits and construction
data.short_description: Lucky Goat Coffee is preparing to open at 12553 Bartram Park Blvd., Suite 302 in Jacksonville, with owners Daniel and Nicole Price targeting a June 18 opening pending permits and construction. The fast-casual specialty coffee shop will seat approximately 25–30 guests indoors with a small patio, featuring an Italian-style espresso program, cold brew, nitro cold brew, and mobile app ordering.
